ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock for which the data is recorded */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "start_datetime" TEXT /* Start datetime of the data interval */,
  "end_datetime" TEXT /* End datetime of the data interval */,
  "start_timestamp" TEXT /* Start timestamp of the data interval */,
  "end_timestamp" TEXT /* End timestamp of the data interval */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock during the interval */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock during the interval */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the interval */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the interval */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of trades during the interval */,
  "trade_count" INTEGER /* Number of trades during the interval */,
  "average_trade_size" REAL /* Average size of trades during the interval */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Highest bid price during the interval */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* Lowest ask price during the interval */,
  "spread" REAL /* Difference between the bid and ask prices */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Measure of price fluctuation during the interval */,
  "liquidity_score" REAL /* Score indicating the liquidity of the stock during the interval */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock (e.g., Software, Pharmaceuticals) */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the stock */,
  "last_dividend" TEXT /* Date of the last dividend */,
  "last_earnings_date" TEXT /* Date of the last earnings report */,
  "next_earnings_date" TEXT /* Date of the next earnings report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for two-factor authentication and notifications */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's team or department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data record accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_datetime" TEXT /* Datetime when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  "trigger_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the alert has been triggered */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Time interval for the alert (e.g., 5 minutes, 1 hour) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, activity) */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* JSON data containing the report content */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Additional parameters used to generate the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is saved */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Datetime when the report was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
